Fields.Name: Name ID
Fields.Description: The expedition name for this night boss.

Fields.Description: The icon to display for this night boss in the Expedition menu.

Fields.Description: The event flag sthat unlocks this night boss as an expedition.

Fields.Name: Defeat Flag
Fields.Description: The event flag set upon defeating this night boss.

Fields.Description: The boss name for this night boss.

Fields.Description: The icon to display for this night boss in the Expedition menu when defeated.

Fields.Description: The ordering in the Expedition Menu.

Fields.Description: The background to display for this night boss in the Expedition menu.
